name: Orange Marmalade Cream Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. DESCRIPTION: These make a great finale for brunch—a nutty shortbread crust topped with orange marmalade and cream cheese.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Butter a 9x13 inch pan.
4. Beat together the butter, sugar, and salt until light and fluffy.
5. Add flour, 1/2 cup at a time, and mix until well blended.
6. Stir in 1 cup of the nuts (the mixture will be crumbly).
7. Place 1 cup of the mixture in a small bowl and add the remaining 1/3 cup nuts. Set aside for topping.
8. Press the remaining mixture over the bottom of the buttered pan.
9. Bake for 15 minutes.
10. Cool completely.
11. Beat the cream cheese until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
12. Stir in vanilla and 3/4 cup of the marmalade.
13. Spread the cooled cookie base with the remaining 3/4 cup marmalade.
14. Pour the cream cheese mixture over top, spreading evenly.
15. Top with the reserved nut mixture.
16. Bake for an additional 20-25 minutes or until the center looks set and is firm.
17. Let cool to room temperature in the pan on a rack.
18. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours before cutting into 24 squares.
19. Refrigerate airtight up to 5 days.
